observable.description: The specific IP, domain, or hash being evaluated (e.g., 'auth-secure365.net')

assessment.description: Short label for the threat level, e.g., 'rare_domain', 'malicious_ip', 'benign'

why_suspicious.description: Explanation of why it is suspicious and how local context makes it interesting

org_prevalence.description: How many times this observable has been seen in the organization recently
